---
name: Change request
about: Request a new feature, behaviour change, or API addition from a consuming repo
labels: needs-discussion
---

## Requesting repo
<!-- Which repo needs this? rl-evo-lab / lang-conditioned-control / other -->

## What do you need?
<!-- Describe the change. Be specific about the API you'd want: function name, arguments, return type. -->

## Why?
<!-- What are you trying to do that rl-core currently can't support? -->

## Breaking impact

- [ ] This change would be **breaking for me** if it is NOT made (I'm blocked)
- [ ] This change would be **breaking for other consumers** if it IS made (renames/removes something existing)

<!-- If breaking for other consumers, list which repos are affected and what they'd need to update. -->

## Suggested implementation
<!-- Optional. If you have a clear idea of how it should work, sketch it here. -->
